args: SECRETS_DIR="${CODEX_SECRETS_DIR:-${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}/secrets}"; SECRET_FILE="$SECRETS_DIR/symphony-linear.env"; if [ ! -f "$SECRET_FILE" ]; then echo "Missing CODEX_SECRETS_DIR/symphony-linear.env with LINEAR_API_KEY" >&2; exit 1; fi; set -a; source "$SECRET_FILE"; set +a; SYMPHONY="$(command -v symphony || true)"; if [ -z "$SYMPHONY" ] && [ -n "${CODEX_LOCAL_BIN_DIR:-}" ] && [ -x "$CODEX_LOCAL_BIN_DIR/symphony" ]; then SYMPHONY="$CODEX_LOCAL_BIN_DIR/symphony"; fi; if [ -z "$SYMPHONY" ]; then echo "symphony not found; install it or set CODEX_LOCAL_BIN_DIR" >&2; exit 127; fi; exec "$SYMPHONY" mcp
